docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GAITE, ALEX
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,253.98 FILED BY COMPUTER TYPESETTING AS TO DEFENDANT GAITE, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMPUTER TYPESETTING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAITE, ALEX $1,253.98 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,318.98, DEFENDANT FAIL TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO ALEX GAITE RETURNED UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSEE NO FORWARD ORDER ON FILE.
